mechanism: Azure Policy denies public network access at the management group level. Exceptions require a policy exemption.
why: Without explicit denial, accidental public exposure is indistinguishable from intentional — attack surface acquired silently with no deployment-time signal.

related.note: Per-landing-zone VNet provides the alternative network path that makes the deny viable.
Security deny policies are never in scope for Defender exemptions.
Must use a Deny-prefixed assignment for network compliance.
Self-service exemptions make hard denies viable.
A compliant default does not substitute for a Deny gate.

violations: Storage account with public network access enabled.
Key Vault with public network access enabled.
